description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content update (Published: June 26, 2026)

Due to the approach of Typhoons No. 7 and No. 8, the Gender Equality Week film screening scheduled for Saturday, June 27, 2026 (Reiwa 8) has been cancelled.

【Cancelled event】
Date and time: Saturday, June 27, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 1:30 p.m.–
Film: "The Lost King: A 500-Year Destiny"
Venue: Hanno City Library

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Thank you for your understanding.

The following related events for Gender Equality Week will proceed as scheduled:

• Gender Equality Week Special Display (June 13–25, 2026, Hanno City Library)
• Gender Equality Week Panel Exhibition (June 20–28, 2026, Hanno Citizen Activity Center)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/11863.html
summary: ℹ️ Gender Equality Week film screening on June 27 cancelled
